parameters.query:
SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurants r
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE r.slug = '{{$json.restaurant_slug}}'
  AND r.is_active = true
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurant_channels c
JOIN restaurants r ON r.id = c.restaurant_id
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE c.is_active = true
  AND c.channel_type = '{{$json.source}}'
  AND c.channel_value = '{{$json.to}}'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json;

return [{
  json: {
    restaurant_id: input.restaurant_id ?? null,
    restaurant_slug: input.slug ?? null,
    restaurant_name: input.name ?? null,
    timezone: input.timezone ?? 'Europe/Paris',
    default_meal_duration_minutes: input.default_meal_duration_minutes ?? 120,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes: input.cleaning_buffer_minutes ?? 15,
    grace_delay_minutes: input.grace_delay_minutes ?? 10,
    max_party_size: input.max_party_size ?? 12,
    allow_combined_tables: input.allow_combined_tables ?? false,
    reminder_days_before: input.reminder_days_before ?? 1,
    reminder_hour: input.reminder_hour ?? 9,
    reminder_channel: input.reminder_channel ?? 'whatsapp',
    booking_policy: input.booking_policy ?? null,
    event_notification_policy: input.event_notification_policy ?? null,
    source: input.source ?? null,
    channel: input.channel ?? null,
    to: input.to ?? null,
    from: input.from ?? null,
    phone: input.phone ?? null,
    email: input.email ?? null,
    full_name: input.full_name ?? null,
    message: input.message ?? '',
    raw_message: input.raw_message ?? '',
    intent: input.intent ?? null,
    requested_datetime: input.requested_datetime ?? null,
    party_size: input.party_size ?? null,
    special_request: input.special_request ?? null,
    call_id: input.call_id ?? null,
    call_status: input.call_status ?? null
  }
}];

messages.content: Tu es un assistant conversationnel de réservation pour un restaurant. Tu accueilles poliment, tu comprends les messages naturels, tu extrais les informations utiles, tu détectes les demandes spéciales, et tu poses les bonnes questions. Tu dois répondre uniquement en JSON strict avec les champs suivants: decision (greet|need_followup|confirm|reject), reply, extracted_data, needs_followup, missing_fields, special_requests. Règles: 1) Si le client dit seulement bonjour, présente-toi brièvement et demande les infos nécessaires. 2) Si la demande est incomplète, demande seulement ce qui manque. 3) Si la demande mentionne des besoins spéciaux (chaise bébé, terrasse, accès PMR, allergies, coin calme, non-fumeur, fumeur, anniversaire, etc.), les intégrer dans special_requests et en tenir compte. 4) Ne jamais inventer une date/heure. 5) Ne jamais parler hors JSON. 6) Si le restaurant est fermé ou indisponible, proposer poliment une alternative si possible. 7) Si le message ne semble pas une demande de réservation, rediriger avec tact vers la prise de réservation.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json;

const extracted = input.extracted_data ?? {};
const specialRequests = Array.isArray(input.special_requests) ? input.special_requests : [];
const missingFields = Array.isArray(input.missing_fields) ? input.missing_fields : [];

return [{
  json: {
    decision: input.decision ?? 'need_followup',
    reply: input.reply ?? 'Bonjour, je suis l’assistant de réservation du restaurant. Je peux vous aider à réserver une table. Pouvez-vous me donner la date, l’heure et le nombre de personnes ?',
    needs_followup: input.needs_followup ?? true,
    missing_fields: missingFields,
    special_requests: specialRequests,
    requested_datetime: extracted.requested_datetime ?? null,
    party_size: extracted.party_size ?? null,
    full_name: extracted.full_name ?? null,
    phone: extracted.phone ?? null,
    email: extracted.email ?? null,
    special_request: extracted.special_request ?? null,
    restaurant_id: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id,
    restaurant_name: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_name,
    restaurant_slug: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_slug,
    timezone: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.timezone,
    default_meal_duration_minutes: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.default_meal_duration_minutes,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    max_party_size: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.max_party_size,
    source: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.source,
    channel: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.channel,
    to: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.to,
    from: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.from,
    message: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.message,
    raw_message: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.raw_message,
    booking_policy: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.booking_policy,
    event_notification_policy: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.event_notification_policy
  }
}];

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM restaurant_closures
WHERE restaurant_id = {{$json.restaurant_id}}
  AND is_active = true
  AND starts_at <= '{{$json.requested_datetime}}'::timestamptz
  AND ends_at > '{{$json.requested_datetime}}'::timestamptz
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO clients (
  restaurant_id,
  full_name,
  phone,
  email,
  is_new_customer,
  consent_notifications,
  consent_marketing,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{$json.restaurant_id}},
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{$json.full_name || ""}}', ''), 'Client'),
  NULLIF('{{$json.phone || ""}}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{$json.email || ""}}', ''),
  TRUE,
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;
